/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL:DEFENSE COUNSEL/ /INVOFF: INSPECTOR MCDONALD/WIT SWORN DA:SHANIMA DEMARTRA/X:VICTIM ADVOCATE IS ALSO PRESENT AT THE WITNESS STAND,/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBITS 1-5:PHOTOS DEPICTING INJURIES/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBITS 6: MEDICAL RECORDS/HTA1:1 AND 3/871D:2/X: THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THAT THE ALLEGATION WITHIN COUNT 3, PENAL CODE SECTION 12022(B)(1) TO BE TRUE,/BAIL:400,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBITS 1-5 RETURNED TO THE DA'S OFFICE AND EXHIBIT 6 RETURN TOTHE CLERK'S OFFICE,/
